options.name: --concurrency
options.description:
Max number of concurrent HTTP requests. Minimum is 1 and 
maximum is 32. (default: 8)

options.name: --cwd
options.description:
Sets the current working directory. (default: current 
directory)

options.name: --depth
options.description:
Recursion depth. Only applied when --recurse is also 
specified.
Minimum is 1 and maximum is 16.
Set to 0 to search arbitrary directory depth. (default: 4)

options.name: --list
options.description:
Lists current packages and their versions even if they have
no upgrade available. (default: false)

options.name: --project
options.description:
Path to a .csproj file to search for upgrades. Exclusive 
with --solution. (default: searches for .csproj files in the current 
directory)

options.name: --show-absolute
options.description:
Shows absolute paths when printing projects and solutions. 
(default: false)

options.name: --solution
options.description:
Path to a .sln file to search for projects. Exclusive with 
--project. (default: searches for .sln files in the current directory if no 
.csproj files are found)

options.name: --target
options.description:
Determines the version to upgrade to:
latest, greatest, major, minor, patch, pre-major, pre-minor, pre-patch. 
(default: latest)

options.name: --upgrade
options.description:
Upgrades packages to the appropriate version based on the 
current --target option. (default: false)

options.name: --version
options.description:
Shows the version of the application. Exits after 
outputting the version.
